components.html:
29 June 2026

Understanding io_uring

A five-minute lesson that builds on asynchronous I/O.

narrative.overview: Drops feels like a clean personal desk in gentle morning light: an open notebook, accumulated dates, and one moss-green pencil. It is quiet without becoming precious and structured without resembling a dashboard.
keyCharacteristics: Reading-first hierarchy with a 68ch prose measure
Ledger-like dates, rules, and completion marks
Restrained moss used for actions and current state only
Flat surfaces with minimal, structural elevation

rules.name: The One Pencil Rule
rules.body: Moss occupies less than ten percent of a screen and always communicates state.

rules.name: The Long Read Rule
rules.body: Lesson prose always uses Source Sans 3 and never exceeds 68ch.

rules.name: The Bound Ledger Rule
rules.body: Permanent content is separated by space and rules, not floating card shadows.

dos: Do prioritize the current lesson and keep reading text within 68ch.
Do preserve visible keyboard focus and pair status color with text or iconography.
donts: Don't resemble a SaaS analytics dashboard or gamified learning product.
Don't use decorative AI gradients, glassmorphism, or floating lesson cards.
